examples: In ancient times there was a custom which still survives in the Chukchee tribe of Asiatic Eskimos.
Never before had an Asiatic power defeated a European one.
An Asiatic lion dozes in the sun at the Zurich Zoo in Switzerland.
There are thought to be around 400 Asiatic lions in Gujarat's Gir forests.
An Asiatic "moon bear" is the first in the world to have a damaged gallbladder removed using keyhole surgery.
